channel.title: Greedy on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Greedy on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #3.1: Sieve Problems — Coin System DP via Sieve
item.description: Sieve + DP for a coin-system problem: greedy optimality under divisibility-chain denominations, optimal substructure, transition by saved coin count, and full code.
